title: New Evangelion Rebuild Movie Figures
summary:
[]: New Evangelion Rebuild Movie Figures             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 18, 2008 4:33 pm I'm sure you've all seen the one of ZOMG TEH Rei!! but look at this one: http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=NEOSL-12515 It's Kaworu-kun! And he's got a KITTY! (In before Manga Cat-Strangling or original Scenario idea of the boy's cat being the Angel(? Or whatever it was).)

Article: New Evangelion Rebuild Movie Figures
[]: New Evangelion Rebuild Movie Figures             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 18, 2008 4:33 pm I'm sure you've all seen the one of ZOMG TEH Rei!! but look at this one: http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=NEOSL-12515 It's Kaworu-kun! And he's got a KITTY! (In before Manga Cat-Strangling or original Scenario idea of the boy's cat being the Angel(? Or whatever it was).)

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Fri Jan 18, 2008 4:55 pm Woop some good news of some "new" stuff, all we need now is Shinji with some mayo woop

[]:             Quote Post by Incisivis » Fri Jan 18, 2008 7:32 pm ...what's Kaworu wearing? Black tights or something? Still, more merchandise is nice.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jan 22, 2008 3:07 pm Um, I believe Kaworu-kun's wearing all black. Black pants and a black shirt. He be badass, yo. (Just as long as he's not EMK but the anime-Kaworu I know and love, provided he's shown as being just as a "messed up cookie" as the other cast members are.) Some Misato-sama: http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=NEOSL-12412 ZOMG TEH Rei: (Out of print.) http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=NEOSL-12204 (Apparently when you turn off the lights her body looks all weird. Or so Newtype USA said.) I'm hoping they'll have a Shinji figure. One of Asuka and Glasses Girl is inevitable so I just HOPE they have a Shinji figure.... (The boy doesn't get enough love! )

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Jan 22, 2008 7:56 pm a bit weird, yet still a little interesting
